title: Demo ChIP-seq primary cohort study
text: Methods. We recruited patients and collected tumor samples for this study. We performed ChIP-seq profiling in our cohort and generated H3K4me3 sequencing data. Data availability. Raw and processed data generated in this study were deposited in GEO under accession GSE100001.

title: Demo RNA-seq generated patient cohort
text: Patients and methods. Patients were recruited after informed consent. We collected tissue samples and performed RNA-seq library preparation and sequencing in our laboratory. Data are available at GEO accession GSE100002.

title: Demo authors generated tumor sequencing data
text: Methods. We generated whole transcriptome sequencing data from our tumor samples. Library preparation and sequencing were performed for this study. Data availability. Sequencing data were submitted to NCBI GEO with accession GSE100003.

title: Demo deposited new expression data
text: Materials and methods. Our cohort included freshly collected biopsies. We profiled gene expression using RNA-seq and generated the dataset analyzed here. The raw data have been deposited in the Gene Expression Omnibus under GSE100004.

title: Demo own samples profiled by sequencing
text: Methods. We collected our samples from recruited donors and performed sequencing and library preparation. The generated expression data and processed files are available at GEO accession GSE100005.

title: Demo recruited cohort and deposited data
text: Data generation. Patients were recruited and samples were collected for this study. We performed RNA-seq and deposited all generated sequencing results in GEO under accession number GSE100006.

title: Demo public GEO reanalysis study
text: Methods. We downloaded publicly available expression profiles from the Gene Expression Omnibus. The GEO dataset GSE200001 was retrieved and reanalyzed to compare disease and control samples. No new sequencing data were generated.

title: Demo downloaded external transcriptomic datasets
text: Data collection. Public datasets were downloaded from GEO and SRA. We obtained GSE200002 from the GEO database and performed secondary analysis using the external transcriptomic data.

title: Demo secondary analysis of public data
text: Methods. This study is a secondary analysis of publicly available RNA-seq data. We retrieved GSE200003 from NCBI GEO and reanalyzed the downloaded dataset using our computational workflow.

title: Demo integrated analysis from GEO
text: Materials and methods. We performed an integrated analysis of public GEO datasets. GSE200004 and GSE200005 were obtained from the Gene Expression Omnibus. The study reused existing data only.

title: Demo obtained datasets from SRA
text: Dataset source. Sequencing reads were obtained from the Sequence Read Archive and linked GEO accession GSE200006. We downloaded the public data and reanalyzed them; no primary sample collection was performed.

title: Demo reused publicly available microarray data
text: Methods. Publicly available microarray data were retrieved from GEO accession GSE200007. The downloaded dataset was reanalyzed with differential expression methods and no new experimental data were generated.
